tasks.subject: Task 1: Persistence lib (persist.ts + overrides.conf wiring)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Hyprland keyword changes apply instantly and survive reboot via a panel-owned overrides file sourced last.

**Files:**
- Create: hypr/config/overrides.conf, ags/lib/persist.ts
- Modify: hypr/hyprland.conf (source config/overrides.conf last)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] overrides.conf sourced last; hyprctl reload clean
- [ ] general:gaps_in = 13 override survives hyprctl reload
- [ ] persist.ts API: setPersistent/resetSetting/hasOverride/getOverride/setAnimationPersistent/hasAnimationOverride/resetAnimation + DEFAULTS
- [ ] Atomic writes via Gio replace_contents

**Verify:** MECHANISM-OK round-trip command in plan Task 1

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ags/lib/persist.ts", "hypr/config/overrides.conf", "hypr/hyprland.conf"], "verifyCommand": "plan Task 1 Verify (MECHANISM-OK) + ags bundle", "acceptanceCriteria": ["override survives reload", "removal restores default", "atomic writes", "bundle passes"], "planTask": 1}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Component library + registry (controls, SettingRow, chips, search, monitors lib)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reusable widgets for descriptive rows and the data-driven row/category registry.

**Files:**
- Create: ags/widget/components/{controls,SettingRow,rows,SearchEntry,ActionChip,MonitorCard}.tsx, ags/lib/{registry,monitors}.ts
- Modify: ags/lib/options.ts (extend OPTIONS), ags/lib/swaync.ts (SWAYNC_DEFAULTS)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] SettingRow: icon plate + title + description + control + conditional reset
- [ ] SliderControl updates value label via closure (no tree-walking)
- [ ] Row factories wire persist/options/reset + requestRefresh
- [ ] ags bundle passes

**Verify:** cd ~/.config/ags && ags bundle app.ts /tmp/claude-panel-build.js; echo $? → 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ags/lib/registry.ts", "ags/lib/monitors.ts", "ags/widget/components/"], "verifyCommand": "cd ~/.config/ags && ags bundle app.ts /tmp/claude-panel-build.js; echo $?", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SettingRow anatomy", "closure-based slider label", "factories wired", "bundle passes"], "planTask": 2}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Panel shell (grouped sidebar, search, footer, freshness) + style.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New shell per layout A: grouped nav, top search, footer action chips, content rebuilt on every show.

**Files:**
- Create: ags/style.ts, temp ags/widget/categories/index.ts barrel
- Rewrite: ags/widget/SettingsPanel.tsx, ags/widget/components/CategoryNav.tsx
- Modify: ags/app.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Grouped sidebar with search on top; uppercase group headers
- [ ] Search → flat breadcrumbed results; clear restores; Esc two-stage
- [ ] Footer chips: Reload Hyprland / Restart Waybar / Update System / Advanced (TUI)
- [ ] Rebuild on notify::visible; 880x640 pywal styling

**Verify:** bundle 0; relaunch; search works; toggle writes overrides.conf

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ags/style.ts", "ags/widget/SettingsPanel.tsx", "ags/widget/components/CategoryNav.tsx", "ags/app.ts", "ags/widget/categories/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "ags bundle + relaunch + functional check (plan Task 3)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["grouped nav+search+footer", "esc two-stage", "rebuild on show", "override written on toggle"], "planTask": 3}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Migrate all categories to the new IA
tasks.description:
**Goal:** All nine categories per spec IA table, data-driven; old category files deleted.

**Files:**
- Create: categories/{Appearance,Animations,Windows,Input,Notifications,Power,DefaultApps}.tsx + Monitors/Startup stubs; rewrite barrel
- Delete: Toggles/Misc/Layout/Apps/AnimationSettings.tsx, components/{Toggle,Slider,Dropdown}.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Every spec IA row present with icon + description (pseudotile/logo/splash dropped)
- [ ] Hyprland rows persist via overrides.conf; fonts run apply-font.sh; cursor theme writes option+conf+gsettings+keyword
- [ ] swaync resets to SWAYNC_DEFAULTS; hypridle file persistence
- [ ] Old files deleted; bundle passes

**Verify:** bundle 0; relaunch; per-category backing-store round-trip

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ags/widget/categories/"], "verifyCommand": "cd ~/.config/ags && ags bundle app.ts /tmp/claude-panel-build.js; echo $?", "acceptanceCriteria": ["IA matches amended spec", "hyprland rows persistent", "resets work", "old files deleted"], "planTask": 4}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Monitors and Startup categories
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fill the Monitors and Startup category stubs.

**Files:**
- Rewrite: ags/widget/categories/Monitors.tsx, Startup.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Monitor cards (name/model/res@hz/scale/position), MAIN badge / Set-as-main, VRR dropdown, Advanced-setup chip → TUI
- [ ] Set-as-main writes options/mainmonitor + primary.conf and refreshes
- [ ] Startup toggles (autologin/clock/randomwallpaper) round-trip options files; clock starts/stops eww

**Verify:** cat options/mainmonitor primary.conf after set-as-main; cat options/{autologin,clock,randomwallpaper} after flips

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ags/widget/categories/Monitors.tsx", "ags/widget/categories/Startup.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cat ~/.config/options/mainmonitor ~/.config/hypr/config/hardware/primary.conf ~/.config/options/autologin ~/.config/options/clock ~/.config/options/randomwallpaper", "acceptanceCriteria": ["monitor cards + set-as-main", "VRR dropdown", "startup toggles round-trip"], "planTask": 5}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Final verification pass
tasks.description:
**Goal:** All six spec verification items pass with captured evidence (build gate = ags bundle).

**Files:** none (fixes only)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] bundle exit 0
- [ ] 9 categories render, no console errors
- [ ] persistence round-trip incl. hyprctl reload + reset
- [ ] freshness on reopen after external keyword change
- [ ] search cross-category with working controls
- [ ] startup toggles tracked in options files

**Verify:** plan Task 6 steps 1-6 with captured output

```json:metadata
{"verifyCommand": "plan Task 6 steps 1-6", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bundle clean", "9 categories render", "persist round-trip", "freshness", "search", "startup toggles"], "planTask": 6}
```
